# Matrix Minds

> AI, machine learning, data science and ethical-hacking consultancy founded by S. Hareedh (often searched as "Matrix Minds Hareedh"). Serving clients worldwide from India.

Matrix Minds is a global technology studio specializing in custom AI/ML
solutions, cybersecurity and penetration testing, data analytics, and
bespoke software. Founded and led by Mr. S. Hareedh.

Contact: matrixmindsha@gmail.com · +91 96293 10410 (Call / WhatsApp)

## About

- [About & Founder](/#founder): Biography of S. Hareedh, founder and CEO of Matrix Minds — background in AI, ML and cybersecurity.
- [Mission & Expertise](/#about): What Matrix Minds does and why clients pick us.

## Services

- [AI & Machine Learning](/#services): Custom predictive models, neural networks, intelligent automation and AI consulting.
- [Ethical Hacking & Cybersecurity](/#services): Authorised penetration testing, vulnerability assessments, security audits.
- [Data Science & Analytics](/#services): Turning raw business data into actionable insights and dashboards.

## Store

- [eBooks & Source Code](/#store): Practical eBooks and ready-to-use source-code bundles for AI, ML and cybersecurity learners.

## Contact

- [Free Consultation](/#contact): Book a free initial consultation worldwide — remote delivery.
